name: GDP (current US$)
source_note: Current price GDP in U.S. dollars. Comparability is limited by exchange rate valuation and national accounting methods.
description: Gross domestic product at market prices in current U.S. dollars.

name: Population, total
source_note: Total population includes all residents regardless of legal status or citizenship. Data may be revised by national statistical offices.
description: Total population of a country, including all residents.

name: CO2 emissions (metric tons per capita)
source_note: Per capita CO2 emissions from burning fossil fuels and cement production. Coverage may vary and source estimates are subject to revision.
description: Annual CO2 emissions in metric tons per person.

name: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force)
source_note: Share of the labor force that is without work but available for and seeking employment. Definitions vary across countries.
description: The unemployment rate as the percentage of the labor force.

name: Poverty headcount ratio at $1.90 a day (% of population)
source_note: Poverty line measured in 2011 PPP international dollars. Comparisons across countries depend on PPP conversion and survey coverage.
description: Percentage of population living below the international extreme poverty line.
